description_long: This is a double-headed axe with a robust, dark metallic blade on each end, symmetrically mounted to a straight wooden handle. The handle features a natural wood grain with a spiral dark pattern, likely for improved grip and visual appeal. Both ends of the axe are fitted with pointed, wedge-shaped metallic tips, making it suitable for both chopping and piercing tasks. The blade is broad and flat, with a slight curvature and a matte black finish, giving it a modern yet utilitarian appearance. The handle appears cylindrical and ergonomically designed for two-handed use, with no visible rubber or synthetic grip. There are no visible brand markings or decorative engravings on the blade or handle.
description: A double-headed axe with a straight wooden handle featuring a spiral pattern and two broad, matte black blades. The design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for heavy-duty urban or outdoor tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the double-headed blade and the spiral-patterned wooden handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the axe blades and the cylindrical handle.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite face of the double-headed blade and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile of the blades and the straight handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical wooden handle with a spiral dark pattern, no visible rubber grip, ergonomic for two-handed use.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, broad, flat blades with a slight curvature and pointed tips, matte black finish, no beard or poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted onto the handle.
